candidates.title: Clean Water as a Basic Right: Conference Highlights Challenges Facing Roma Communities in Odesa Region
candidates.snippet:
On May 15, a conference was held in Kyiv to address environmental challenges affecting Roma settlements and the impact of water quality on the health of Roma communities in Odesa Region. The event brought together representatives of civil society, public institutions, international organizations, and Roma communities to discuss one of the most fundamental issues —...

candidates.snippet:

The Roma Women Fund “Chirikli” joined the event and presented the results of its monitoring activities and ongoing analytical work on the situation of Roma...

candidates.title: Chirikli’s Voice in Brussels: Roma Week Discussion on Challenges and Opportunities in the EU Enlargement Region
candidates.snippet:
On April 23, the European Parliament hosted the international event “Challenges and Opportunities of Roma in the EU Enlargement Region”, bringing together policymakers, international organizations, experts, and Roma community representatives to discuss the situation of Roma communities in EU candidate countries and neighboring states. The discussion focused on the findings of large-scale studies examining the...

The post

candidates.title: Po 20.000 dinara za svakog osnovca u Nišu: Škole prikupljaju podatke, isplata u avgustu
candidates.snippet:
Roditelji ne podnose poseban zahtev Gradu, već će osnovne škole u narednom periodu prikupljati i dostavljati neophodne podatke za isplatu pomoći. Iz Grada Niša navode da će sredstva biti uplaćena na račune roditelja, staratelja ili hranitelja u periodu od 1. do 15. avgusta.
